# Swarms Cloud | Multi-Agent AI Platform

> Build, deploy, and scale multi-agent AI systems. Orchestrate 17+ swarm architectures, including Hierarchical, Sequential, Concurrent, Mixture-of-Agents, Council, Debate-with-Judge, and more, through an OpenAI-compatible API powered by a Rust agent runtime.

Swarms Cloud is the enterprise-grade platform for building, deploying, and scaling multi-agent AI systems. Manage single agents, reasoning agents, and production swarm workflows from a unified API with full observability, execution history, and transparent rate limits.

## Getting Started

- [API Documentation](https://docs.swarms.ai): Complete reference for the Swarms Cloud REST API
- [Python SDK](https://docs.swarms.ai): `pip install swarms`, official Python client
- [TypeScript SDK](https://docs.swarms.ai): `@swarms/sdk`, for Node, Deno, and edge runtimes
- [Go SDK](https://docs.swarms.ai): Idiomatic Go client for production services
- [Create an Account](https://swarms.ai/signup): Free workspace with included credits

## Key Features

- [Agents & Swarms](https://swarms.ai/swarms): 16+ multi-agent coordination patterns, including Hierarchical, Sequential, Concurrent, Graph, Mixture-of-Agents, Council, Debate, Router, Majority Voting, Group Chat, and more
- [Reasoning Agents](https://swarms.ai/models): Dedicated completions for step-by-step reasoning tasks
- [Deep Research](https://swarms.ai/swarms): Research agents that fan out across sources and synthesize findings
- [Batch Operations](https://swarms.ai/apps): Run agent fleets in a single API call with grid workflows
- [Tools & MCP](https://docs.swarms.ai): Exa web search, Model Context Protocol servers, vision, function calling
- [Structured Outputs](https://docs.swarms.ai): Schema-enforced JSON from any agent or swarm
- [OpenAI-Compatible API](https://swarms.ai/learn-more): Drop-in /v1/chat/completions replacement

## Pricing

- [$6.50 per 1M input tokens](https://swarms.ai/pricing): Unified rate across all supported models
- $18.50 per 1M output tokens
- [Night Mode](https://swarms.ai/pricing): 50% discount on swarm tokens, 8 PM–6 AM Pacific
- [Calculator](https://swarms.ai/pricing): Model your exact workload by tokens, agents, and tools

## API Reference

- [API Overview](https://docs.swarms.ai): Authentication, rate limits, and base URLs
- [/v1/agent/completions](https://docs.swarms.ai): Single agent execution
- [/v1/swarm/completions](https://docs.swarms.ai): Multi-agent swarm orchestration
- [/v1/research](https://docs.swarms.ai): Deep research sessions
- [/v1/reasoning](https://docs.swarms.ai): Reasoning agent completions
- [/v1/batch](https://docs.swarms.ai): Batched fleet operations
- [API Keys](https://swarms.ai/api-keys): Create and manage workspace API keys

## Management Console

- [Workbench](https://swarms.ai/workbench): Author, configure, and test agents against production
- [Playground](https://swarms.ai/playground): Compose multi-agent swarms interactively
- [Observability](https://swarms.ai/observability): Live dashboards for request volume, success rate, rate limits
- [Execution History](https://swarms.ai/history): Searchable logs with token usage and per-run cost
- [Model Catalog](https://swarms.ai/models): Browse and configure models across providers
- [Prompt Generator](https://swarms.ai/prompts): Auto-generate production-grade system prompts

## Optional

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/kyegomez/swarms): Star the open-source Swarms package
- [Swarms Framework Docs](https://docs.swarms.world): Documentation for the open-source swarms Python package
- [Status Page](https://status.swarms.ai): Real-time API uptime and incident reports
- [@swarms_corp](https://twitter.com/swarms_corp): Follow for product updates
